description: Security baseline standards — auth/session requirements, authorization enforcement, sensitive data handling, abuse controls.

fixed_rules.name: No Secrets in Source
fixed_rules.description: No secrets, API keys, tokens, or credentials may appear in source code or configuration files checked into version control.

fixed_rules.name: Sensitive Data Logging Prohibition
fixed_rules.description: Sensitive data (PII, credentials, tokens) must never be written to logs, traces, or error messages.

fixed_rules.name: Authentication Required for Mutations
fixed_rules.description: All state-mutating operations must require authenticated identity when auth is enabled.

fixed_rules.name: Authorization Check Before Access
fixed_rules.description: Every protected resource access must verify authorization before returning data or executing actions.

fixed_rules.name: Input Validation Required
fixed_rules.description: All external inputs must be validated and sanitized before processing.

configurable_rules.name: Session Timeout
configurable_rules.description: Maximum session duration before requiring re-authentication.

configurable_rules.name: Rate Limiting Baseline
configurable_rules.description: Public-facing endpoints must have rate limiting when abuse controls are applicable.
